headline: MarketBeat Week in Review – 03/30 - 04/03
summary: Stocks and the price of oil continue to be inversely linked, and that's likely to remain the case heading into a new earnings season

headline: Valero Energy Corp (NYSE:VLO) Shows Bull Flag Pattern in Technical Breakout Setup
summary: Valero Energy (VLO) shows a perfect technical rating and a high-quality bull flag setup, signaling a potential breakout from its current consolidation.
